title: neophloga curtisii
intro: Neophloga curtisii, also known as the kiokio, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand, characterized by its red or pink flowers and edible roots. The medicinal properties of Neophloga curtisii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of consuming kiokio include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
